item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-07)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 41284 Trending skills: 16019 Hot skills: 2397 Top All Time: find-skills (442700) Top Trending: sleek-design-mobile-apps (14083) Top Hot: agent-tools (596)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): expo-api-routes
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 17 Source: expo/skills Description: Guidelines for creating API routes in Expo Router with EAS Hosting

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): remotion-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 94 Source: remotion-dev/skills Description: Best practices for Remotion - Video creation in React

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): building-native-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 22 Source: expo/skills Description: Complete guide for building beautiful apps with Expo Router. Covers fundamentals, styling, components, navigation, animations, patterns, and native tabs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): expo-tailwind-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 17 Source: expo/skills Description: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 in Expo with react-native-css and NativeWind v5 for universal styling

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): stitch-loop
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 19 Source: google-labs-code/stitch-skills Description: Teaches agents to iteratively build websites using Stitch with an autonomous baton-passing loop pattern

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): electron
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 17 Source: vercel-labs/agent-browser Description: Automate Electron desktop apps (VS Code, Slack, Discord, Figma, Notion, Spotify, etc.) using agent-browser via Chrome DevTools Protocol. Use when the user needs to interact with an Electron app, automate a desktop app, connect to a running app, control a native app, or test an Electron application. Triggers include "automate Slack app", "control VS Code", "interact with Discord app", "test this Electron app", "connect to desktop app", or any task requiring automation of a native Electron application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): upgrading-expo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 16 Source: expo/skills Description: Guidelines for upgrading Expo SDK versions and fixing dependency issues

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 68 Source: am-will/codex-skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): expo-dev-client
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 16 Source: expo/skills Description: Build and distribute Expo development clients locally or via TestFlight

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): expo-cicd-workflows
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 14 Source: expo/skills Description: Helps understand and write EAS workflow YAML files for Expo projects. Use this skill when the user asks about CI/CD or workflows in an Expo or EAS context, mentions .eas/workflows/, or wants help with EAS build pipelines or deployment automation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): use-dom
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 12 Source: expo/skills Description: Use Expo DOM components to run web code in a webview on native and as-is on web. Migrate web code to native incrementally.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): native-data-fetching
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 17 Source: expo/skills Description: Use when implementing or debugging ANY network request, API call, or data fetching. Covers fetch API, axios, React Query, SWR, error handling, caching strategies, offline support.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): expo-deployment
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 15 Source: expo/skills Description: Deploying Expo apps to iOS App Store, Android Play Store, web hosting, and API routes

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): slack
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 11 Source: vercel-labs/agent-browser Description: Interact with Slack workspaces using browser automation. Use when the user needs to check unread channels, navigate Slack, send messages, extract data, find information, search conversations, or automate any Slack task. Triggers include "check my Slack", "what channels have unreads", "send a message to", "search Slack for", "extract from Slack", "find who said", or any task requiring programmatic Slack interaction.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): accessibility
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 8 Source: addyosmani/web-quality-skills Description: Audit and improve web accessibility following WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Use when asked to "improve accessibility", "a11y audit", "WCAG compliance", "screen reader support", "keyboard navigation", or "make accessible".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): core-web-vitals
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 8 Source: addyosmani/web-quality-skills Description: Optimize Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS) for better page experience and search ranking. Use when asked to "improve Core Web Vitals", "fix LCP", "reduce CLS", "optimize INP", "page experience optimization", or "fix layout shifts".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): seo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 8 Source: addyosmani/web-quality-skills Description: Optimize for search engine visibility and ranking. Use when asked to "improve SEO", "optimize for search", "fix meta tags", "add structured data", "sitemap optimization", or "search engine optimization".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): database-schema-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 60 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and optimize database schemas for SQL and NoSQL databases. Use when creating new databases, designing tables, defining relationships, indexing strategies, or database migrations. Handles PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, normalization, and performance optimization.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): project-workflow-analysis-blueprint-generator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 45 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Comprehensive technology-agnostic prompt generator for documenting end-to-end application workflows. Automatically detects project architecture patterns, technology stacks, and data flow patterns to generate detailed implementation blueprints covering entry points, service layers, data access, error handling, and testing approaches across multiple technologies including .NET, Java/Spring, React, and microservices architectures.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#30): videoagent-video-studio
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 1577 Source: pexoai/pexo-skills Description: Generate short AI videos from text or images — text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference-based generation — with zero API key setup. Use when the user wants to create a video clip, animate an image, or generate video from a description.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#50): security-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 1360 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement security best practices for web applications and infrastructure. Use when securing APIs, preventing common vulnerabilities, or implementing security policies. Handles HTTPS, CORS, XSS, SQL Injection, CSRF, rate limiting, and OWASP Top 10.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (10 → 33): baoyu-post-to-wechat
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #33 Delta: -23 Installs: 27 (prev 55) Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Posts content to WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) via Chrome CDP automation. Supports article posting (文章) with full markdown formatting and image-text posting (图文) with multiple images. Use when user mentions "发布公众号", "post to wechat", "微信公众号", or "图文/文章".

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (13 → 38): baoyu-image-gen
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #13 Current rank: #38 Delta: -25 Installs: 24 (prev 57) Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: AI image generation with OpenAI and Google APIs. Supports text-to-image, reference images, aspect ratios, and parallel generation (recommended 4 concurrent subagents). Use when user asks to generate, create, or draw images.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (2 → 6): python-sdk
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #2 Current rank: #6 Delta: -4 Installs: 75 (prev 159) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Python SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, and integrate with 150+ models. Package: inferencesh (pip install inferencesh). Supports sync/async, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, and human approval. Use for: Python integration, AI apps, agent development, RAG pipelines, automation. Triggers: python sdk, inferencesh, pip install, python api, python client, async inference, python agent, tool builder python, programmatic ai, python integration, sdk python

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (6 → 7): chat-ui
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #6 Current rank: #7 Delta: -1 Installs: 67 (prev 126) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Chat UI building blocks for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Components: container, messages, input, typing indicators, avatars. Capabilities: chat interfaces, message lists, input handling, streaming. Use for: building custom chat UIs, messaging interfaces, AI assistants. Triggers: chat ui, chat component, message list, chat input, shadcn chat, react chat, chat interface, messaging ui, conversation ui, chat building blocks

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (27 → 9): frontend-design
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #27 Current rank: #9 Delta: +18 Installs: 41 (prev 51) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (29 → 20): adapt
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #29 Current rank: #20 Delta: +9 Installs: 37 (prev 49) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Adapt designs to work across different screen sizes, devices, contexts, or platforms. Ensures consistent experience across varied environments.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (3 → 2): videoagent-video-studio
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #3 Current rank: #2 Delta: +1 Installs: 151 (prev 150) Source: pexoai/pexo-skills Description: Generate short AI videos from text or images — text-to-video, image-to-video, and reference-based generation — with zero API key setup. Use when the user wants to create a video clip, animate an image, or generate video from a description.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (31 → 12): animate
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #31 Current rank: #12 Delta: +19 Installs: 38 (prev 47) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Review a feature and enhance it with purposeful animations, micro-interactions, and motion effects that improve usability and delight.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (33 → 13): audit
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #33 Current rank: #13 Delta: +20 Installs: 37 (prev 48) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Perform comprehensive audit of interface quality across accessibility, performance, theming, and responsive design. Generates detailed report of issues with severity ratings and recommendations.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (34 → 10): polish
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #34 Current rank: #10 Delta: +24 Installs: 39 (prev 48) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Final quality pass before shipping. Fixes alignment, spacing, consistency, and detail issues that separate good from great.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (35 → 11): optimize
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #35 Current rank: #11 Delta: +24 Installs: 39 (prev 48) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve interface performance across loading speed, rendering, animations, images, and bundle size. Makes experiences faster and smoother.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (36 → 22): normalize
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #36 Current rank: #22 Delta: +14 Installs: 36 (prev 47) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Normalize design to match your design system and ensure consistency

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (38 → 19): delight
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #38 Current rank: #19 Delta: +19 Installs: 36 (prev 47) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add moments of joy, personality, and unexpected touches that make interfaces memorable and enjoyable to use. Elevates functional to delightful.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (39 → 25): distill
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #39 Current rank: #25 Delta: +14 Installs: 35 (prev 47) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Strip designs to their essence by removing unnecessary complexity. Great design is simple, powerful, and clean.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (40 → 24): teach-impeccable
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #40 Current rank: #24 Delta: +16 Installs: 35 (prev 47) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: One-time setup that gathers design context for your project and saves it to your AI config file. Run once to establish persistent design guidelines.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (41 → 15): extract
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #41 Current rank: #15 Delta: +26 Installs: 37 (prev 46) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Extract and consolidate reusable components, design tokens, and patterns into your design system. Identifies opportunities for systematic reuse and enriches your component library.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (42 → 17): clarify
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #42 Current rank: #17 Delta: +25 Installs: 37 (prev 47) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve unclear UX copy, error messages, microcopy, labels, and instructions. Makes interfaces easier to understand and use.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (43 → 21): bolder
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #43 Current rank: #21 Delta: +22 Installs: 36 (prev 46) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Amplify safe or boring designs to make them more visually interesting and stimulating. Increases impact while maintaining usability.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (44 → 27): quieter
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #44 Current rank: #27 Delta: +17 Installs: 34 (prev 46) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Tone down overly bold or visually aggressive designs. Reduces intensity while maintaining design quality and impact.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (45 → 16): colorize
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #45 Current rank: #16 Delta: +29 Installs: 37 (prev 46) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add strategic color to features that are too monochromatic or lack visual interest. Makes interfaces more engaging and expressive.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (46 → 18): critique
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #46 Current rank: #18 Delta: +28 Installs: 37 (prev 46) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Evaluate design effectiveness from a UX perspective. Assesses visual hierarchy, information architecture, emotional resonance, and overall design quality with actionable feedback.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (47 → 26): search
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #47 Current rank: #26 Delta: +21 Installs: 35 (prev 37) Source: tavily-ai/skills Description: Search the web using Tavily's LLM-optimized search API. Returns relevant results with content snippets, scores, and metadata. Use when you need to find web content on any topic without writing code.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (5 → 3): widgets-ui
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #5 Current rank: #3 Delta: +2 Installs: 88 (prev 131) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Declarative UI widgets from JSON for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Render rich interactive UIs from structured agent responses. Capabilities: forms, buttons, cards, layouts, inputs, selects, checkboxes. Use for: agent-generated UIs, dynamic forms, data display, interactive cards. Triggers: widgets, declarative ui, json ui, widget renderer, agent widgets, dynamic ui, form widgets, card widgets, shadcn widgets, structured output ui

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (9 → 5): tools-ui
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #5 Delta: +4 Installs: 75 (prev 116) Source: toolshell/skills Description: Tool lifecycle UI components for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Display tool calls: pending, progress, approval required, results. Capabilities: tool status, progress indicators, approval flows, results display. Use for: showing agent tool calls, human-in-the-loop approvals, tool output. Triggers: tool ui, tool calls, tool status, tool approval, tool results, agent tools, mcp tools ui, function calling ui, tool lifecycle, tool pending

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (10 → 18): azure-rbac
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #18 Delta: -8 Installs: 2269 (prev 3622) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Helps users find the right Azure RBAC role for an identity with least privilege access, then generate CLI commands and Bicep code to assign it. USE FOR: "what role should I assign", "least privilege role", "RBAC role for", "role to read blobs", "role for managed identity", "custom role definition", "assign role to identity". DO NOT USE FOR: creating or configuring managed identities, or general Azure security hardening; those are out of scope for this role-selection skill.

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (11 → 19): azure-resource-visualizer
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #11 Current rank: #19 Delta: -8 Installs: 2269 (prev 3621) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Analyze Azure resource groups and generate detailed Mermaid architecture diagrams showing the relationships between individual resources. USE FOR: create architecture diagram, visualize Azure resources, show resource relationships, generate Mermaid diagram, analyze resource group, diagram my resources, architecture visualization, resource topology, map Azure infrastructure DO NOT USE FOR: creating/modifying resources (use azure-deploy), security scanning (use azure-security), performance troubleshooting (use azure-diagnostics), code generation (use relevant service skill)

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (12 → 15): azure-compliance
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #12 Current rank: #15 Delta: -3 Installs: 2271 (prev 3621) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Comprehensive Azure compliance and security auditing capabilities including best practices assessment, Key Vault expiration monitoring, and resource configuration validation. USE FOR: compliance scan, security audit, azqr, Azure best practices, Key Vault expiration check, compliance assessment, resource review, configuration validation, expired certificates, expiring secrets, orphaned resources, policy compliance, security posture evaluation. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), cost analysis alone (use azure-cost-optimization), active security hardening (use azure-security-hardening), general Azure Advisor queries (use azure-observability).

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (13 → 16): appinsights-instrumentation
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #13 Current rank: #16 Delta: -3 Installs: 2271 (prev 3621) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Guidance for instrumenting webapps with Azure Application Insights. Provides telemetry patterns, SDK setup, and configuration references. USE FOR: how to instrument app, App Insights SDK, telemetry patterns, what is App Insights, Application Insights guidance, instrumentation examples, APM best practices. DO NOT USE FOR: adding App Insights to my app (use azure-prepare), add telemetry to my project (use azure-prepare), add monitoring (use azure-prepare). This skill provides guidance—azure-prepare orchestrates component changes.

item.title: [Trending] Rank down (14 → 20): azure-prepare
item.description: Trending leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #14 Current rank: #20 Delta: -6 Installs: 2269 (prev 3620) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Default entry point for Azure application development. Invoke this skill for ANY application work related to Azure: creating apps, building features, adding components, updating code, migrating, or modernizing. Analyzes your project and prepares it for Azure deployment by generating infrastructure code (Bicep/Terraform), azure.yaml configuration, and Dockerfiles. USE FOR: create an app, build a web app, create API, create frontend, create backend, add a feature, build a service, make an application, develop a project, migrate my app, modernize my code, update my application, add database, add authentication, add caching, deploy to Azure, host on Azure, Azure with Terraform (defaults to azd+Terraform), Azure with azd, generate azure.yaml, generate Bicep or Terraform, prepare Azure Functions. DO NOT USE FOR: only validating an already-prepared app (use azure-validate), only running azd up/deploy (use azure-deploy), pure Terraform without azd (prefer azd+Terraform).
